data.title: Rocket Lab stock rises after Morgan Stanley upgrade, while AST SpaceMobile wins prime defense contract.
data.description: Rocket Lab's stock (RKLB) saw an increase following an upgrade from Morgan Stanley. Additionally, AST SpaceMobile received a prime contract from the Missile Defense Agency. These developments led to rallies for both companies in the space sector, signaling positive market sentiment. The upgrade from Morgan Stanley and the defense contract awarded to AST SpaceMobile were significant catalysts for these stock movements.

data.title: Avangrid's NECEC project completed and energized, adding 1,200 MW of hydropower to ISO-New England, lowering energy costs. Commercial operation date: Jan 16, 2026.
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company under the Iberdrola Group, has declared the New England Clean Energy Connect (NECEC) project as fully operational and energized. This project, which became commercially operational on January 16, 2026, is a significant addition to the region's energy landscape, providing 1,200 MW of new hydropower to strengthen grid reliability and reduce energy expenses. NECEC is now one of the largest sources of baseload energy in New England, marking a milestone in enhancing the region's energy infrastructure.

data.title: RefrigiWear donates critical cold-weather gear to Western Alaska flood recovery efforts through 6th Avenue Outfitters.
data.description: A substantial contribution of cold-weather gear has been made to aid Alaska families and workers reconstructing after severe flooding. RefrigiWear, a prominent producer of insulated workwear and personal protective equipment for harsh cold conditions, has played a vital role in providing support. This donation is crucial for safeguarding individuals in the region. The assistance provided by RefrigiWear is a significant intervention, considering the challenging circumstances and the urgent need for proper protection. The company's dedication to supplying high-quality gear for extreme cold is commendable, and the impact of this donation is substantial, benefiting a large number of people in Alaska during the recovery process.

data.title: Doseology Sciences Inc. files Annual Information Form (AIF) improving transparency for investors. Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: Kelowna, British Columbia, on January 16, 2026 - Doseology Sciences Inc. (CSE: MOOD) (PINK: DOSEF) (FSE: VU70), a prominent player in biotechnology-based consumer goods, disclosed the submission of its Annual Information Form ("AIF"). This document is essential for Canadian public companies and provides crucial insight into the company's financial and operational performance.

data.title: Dow Jones near record high; Nvidia stock gains key level. Transport stock wavers.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index surged close to its all-time high, showing positive momentum in the stock market. Nvidia stock successfully regained a significant benchmark on Thursday. The stock market today witnessed a slight dip in the Dow while Nvidia made gains. Additionally, a transport stock exhibited fluctuations. This live coverage highlights the dynamic movements in the market, indicating the Dow's climb and Nvidia's resilience.

data.title: Shoot 360 to open new tech-powered basketball training center in San Mateo County on Jan 30, 2026. Expanding global franchise to Bay Area.
data.description: A renowned global basketball franchise, Shoot 360, known for its cutting-edge technology-driven training programs, is set to expand its presence to San Mateo County. The latest branch opening in the Bay Area is scheduled for January 16, 2026. This move brings gamified and immersive basketball training to the region, catering to enthusiasts and professionals alike. Founded in (year), Shoot 360 has gained recognition for revolutionizing basketball skill development through its innovative methods. The San Mateo County location marks a significant milestone in the franchise's expansion strategy, introducing its renowned training approach to a new audience. This development is poised to benefit the local basketball community, providing access to state-of-the-art training facilities and expertise. Overall, Shoot 360's entry into San Mateo County signifies a valuable opportunity for individuals to enhance their basketball skills using cutting-edge technologies.

data.title: Great American Food Chain, Inc. has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Green Matter BioTech.
data.description: The Great American Food Chain, Inc. has confirmed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding with Green Matter BioTech. This agreement signals a significant partnership between the two entities. Key highlights include potential collaboration in various sectors and joint efforts for future projects. The deal aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to maximize growth opportunities in the market. Financial terms were not disclosed at this time, but the alliance has set ambitious goals for mutual success.

data.title: Iran's $7.8 billion crypto economy involved state military networks and civilians, with IRGC controlling half of the crypto activity by receiving $3 billion in Q4 2025.
data.description: In 2025, Iran's cryptocurrency ecosystem reached $7.8 billion, with funds divided between state-controlled military channels and civilians seeking refuge from a currency that has depreciated by 90% since 2018. Chainalysis research revealed that the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) dominated Iran's crypto landscape, representing over 50% of the country's total cryptocurrency transactions in Q4 2025, soaring from $2 billion in 2024 to $3 billion in 2025. Chainalysis monitored addresses associated with IRGC members, groups circumventing sanctions, and individuals engaged in illicit activities like oil and arms trafficking across the Middle East. However, the actual amount is likely greater as the data is limited to wallets identified by the U.S. Treasury and Israeli authorities, excluding undisclosed intermediaries and shell companies. Additionally, civilians withdrew Bitcoin amid protests and internet disruptions. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global melatonin supplements market expected to grow from $3.3 billion in 2025 to $13.1 billion by 2035 due to rising demand.
data.description: On January 16th, 2026, in Newark, Delaware, it was reported that the worldwide market for melatonin supplements is in a critical "scaling phase." Experts predict that its value will increase significantly from $3.3 billion in 2025 to $13.1 billion by 2035. This swift growth signals a significant opportunity for growth in the industry.

data.title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. introduces FPGA to speed up tensor network computing for quantum spin models. (Characters: 97)
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on January 16, 2026, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO) introduced a groundbreaking hardware acceleration technology that transforms the quantum tensor network algorithm into parallel computing circuits. HOLO, a technology service provider, aims to revolutionize processing speeds with this innovation.

data.title: ElleVet Sciences introduces CBD + CBDA Feline Soft Chews for cats in South Portland, Maine on Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: ElleVet Sciences, a reputable company based in South Portland, Maine, introduced a new addition to their line of cat products on January 16, 2026. This launch includes Feline CBD + CBDA Soft Chews, which are known for being safe, effective, and palatable for cats. ElleVet Sciences is recognized for its science-backed CBD + CBDA products for pets, and this expansion showcases their commitment to providing quality options for feline care.

data.title: Machine Investment Group buys Rise 120: 227 residential units and 15,000 SF retail in Georgetown, Texas; expanding presence in Austin MSA.
data.description: A development known as Rise 120 in Georgetown, TX is set to include 227 residential units and 15,000 square feet of retail space. The project is being led by Machine Investment Group (MIG), a real estate investment firm with a focus on opportunistic, distressed, and special situation properties. This news was announced in Austin, Texas on January 16, 2026.

data.title: High Strength Aluminum Alloys Market projected to reach $115.29 billion by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 16, 2026, a report from MarketsandMarkets revealed insights on the High Strength Aluminum Alloys Market. The market is segmented by Grade into 2xxx Series, 6xxx Series, and 7xxx Series, with varying Tensile Strength categorized as High Strength and Ultra High Strength. Additionally, the alloys are classified based on Formulation as Heat Treatable Alloy or Non-Heat Treatable. This analysis provides a comprehensive overview of the industry's landscape, aiding in better understanding the market dynamics and trends.
